channel.title: +shrI-vaiShNava on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +shrI-vaiShNava on Vishvas's notes

item.title: hebbAr IyengAr
item.description: This is a community of shrI-vaiShNava-s in Southern Karnataka. Divided into two religious sects, the Vadakalai and the Thenkalai, though the vast majority of Hebbar iyengars belong to the Vadakalai sect. Etymology ಹೆಬ್ಬಾರ-ಶಬ್ದದ ಉತ್ಪತ್ತಿಯು - ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಪದಾರ್ಥಚಿನ್ತಾಮಣಿಯಲ್ಲಿ (ಹೆಬ್ಬ ಹರುವ. ಪಾರ್ → ನೋಡು ಪಾರ್ಪನು → ಹಾರುವನು / ಹರುವ. ). Locations and Origins Major villages (most hebbAr v1s emigrated out of these during 1900-s.) Gorur, Ambuga Kadaba, Nonavinakere, Sampige Bindiganavile, Nuggehalli, Shantigrama, Saligrama, Malur, Mavinakere Hiremagalur There is a strong correlation between gotra and village of origin as per .
